sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47809" key="*qallw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Θαλλώ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, one of the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὧραι</foreign>, a divinity of increase, Jusj. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0034.tlg001.perseus-grc1:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lycurg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:35:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.35.2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
